_meta.purpose: The crosswalk between the LIVE verdict reason_code vocabularies and the founder-kill vocab the writeback loop (B082) consumes. Root cause of the SEVERED wire (B083): three disjoint vocabularies never meet — portal answers speak {cliche,weak_hook,tone_off,off_brief,too_long,cultural_red_line}; client ledger events speak {too_generic,factual_error}; founder_taste.json kills speak {generic_celebration_template,very_normal,...}. A kill can only propagate when a ledger event's reason_code IS a founder-kill slug — which never happens without this translation.
_meta.law: Rule #6 (a writer needs a reader) + Rule #12 (the system/Mohamed owns taste, we do not author it). Entries are PROVISIONAL proposals until Mohamed confirms; ONLY status=='confirmed' entries whose kill is a real founder-kill slug are ever consumed. proposed/null entries propagate NOTHING.
